expected_properties: If input a remains constant, both rise and down stay 0
additional_cases.goal: Verify that no edge is reported when a does not toggle.
stimulus_intent: Hold a at constant value (0) for multiple clock cycles
timing_assumptions: Observe over at least two clock cycles after stimulus

expected_properties: Consecutive opposite edges are each reported on the following clock
additional_cases.goal: Test back-to-back rising then falling edge detection without idle cycles.
notes: Ensures detection works for immediate successive edges
stimulus_intent: Toggle a from 0 to 1 then back to 0 on successive clock cycles
timing_assumptions: Observe rise on cycle after first toggle and down on cycle after second toggle

expected_properties: When input a does not change, rise and down remain 0
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Confirm that stable input yields no spurious edge signals.
notes: Ensures idle behavior is correctly handled.
stimulus_intent: Drive a constant value (e.g., 0) for several clock cycles
timing_assumptions: Observe over multiple clock cycles after stimulus
